headline: Caterpillar (CAT) Valuation Check As PROPWR Power Deal Expands Data Center And Energy Infrastructure Opportunity
summary: Caterpillar (CAT) just signed a framework agreement to supply up to 2.1 gigawatts of power generation assets to ProPetro’s PROPWR unit, highlighting its role in data center and industrial energy infrastructure. See our latest analysis for Caterpillar. The PROPWR agreement lands at a time when Caterpillar’s momentum has been strong, with a 30 day share price return of 8.78% and a year to date share price return of 47.04%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 159.01% and 3 year total...
